title: Worked Example - Calculating the Total Price

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use **default arguments** in C++ to calculate the total price of an item, optionally including tax. The function `calculateTotalPrice()` takes the original price and an optional tax rate, defaulting to `5%` if not provided.

---
**When executed, the code will show:**

```java
Total price with default tax: $105
Total price with 10% tax: $110
```
